title: Crashers Wolves
description: Add 4 NEW wolves to your game!!
body:
[

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026201561576dffe9c021d2941061262797cee60.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/crasher120/projects)[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e009480f2af8c79e3ea4e398338cae87e9ff8c31.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Crasher120)[![BlueSky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f95aae0aa5dfa831a8022918c7b01becf079bbf6.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/crasher120.bsky.social)[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7cde82586b398a24a306fc4948f278f877ae1e.png)

](https://discord.gg/RxhH3zTsjB) ![CrashesWolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3cf5564e8f714979ceed28c55a734ae4663aad.png) # Crashers Wolves **This Data pack adds 4 additional wolves to your game!**\ **These wolves spawn in addition to the new wolves in 1.20.6**\ **To get to pack working you MUST download the [Resource Pack!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crashers-wolvez)** ![Wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c6959188ce5cdde5f8bee58e9c5964a1b3d105a.png) ## The Timber Wolf > **Found in dark oak forests**\ > **Spawns in packs of 4** ![Timber Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OeCTiEhf/images/4e148472e7149f38ed02032a62422023bbf4da77.png) ## The Prairie Wolf > **Found in cherry groves**\ > **Spawns in packs of 1-4** ![Prairie Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OeCTiEhf/images/1fe6e3cf7b9c82223bfe9f6b7eac483bf4eb2282.png) ## The Smoky Wolf > **Found in birch forests**\ > **Spawns in packs of 2-3** ![Smoky Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OeCTiEhf/images/b476862bdfb6f1a86c95996118b8e3c42cb71ec4.png) ## The Scarlet Wolf > **Found in old growth birch forests**\ > **Spawns in packs of 1-3** ![Scarlet Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OeCTiEhf/images/d1edea314658ac318d4d5c54fa6a9dd6838991e8.png)
